case_title: TONY W. HO et al VS. BRITTANY COX

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY HO, TONY W. HE, JIAN HUA AS TO DEFENDANT COX, BRITTANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
